/usr/bin/ar qc libavsdk_core.a CMakeFiles/avsdk_core.dir/demuxer/ffmpeg_demuxer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/avsdk_core.dir/demuxer/network_demuxer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/avsdk_core.dir/decoder/ffmpeg_decoder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/avsdk_core.dir/encoder/ffmpeg_encoder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/avsdk_core.dir/player/player_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/avsdk_core.dir/buffer/ring_buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/avsdk_core.dir/hls/hls_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/avsdk_core.dir/network/retry_policy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/avsdk_core.dir/bypass/data_bypass_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/avsdk_core.dir/bypass/screenshot_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/avsdk_core.dir/bypass/video_recorder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/avsdk_core.dir/bypass/filter_processor.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libavsdk_core.a
